title: asteriscus maritimus subsp. sericeus
intro: Asteriscus maritimus subsp. sericeus is a subspecies of the Asteriscus maritimus plant, a type of shrub native to North Africa and the Mediterranean region, known for its delicate white flowers and soft, silky foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Asteriscus maritimus subsp. sericeus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
